description: Style NoteThe stitch detailing and colour splash on this rakishly designed shirt from Provouge adds casual styling to your ensemble, while the fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. Team it with jeans and canvas shoes for an effortlessly awesome look!Product DetailsBrown and white checked shirt with a spread collar, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, full buttoned placket, patch pocket on the left chest with a buttoned flap, branding on the pocket, asymmetric yoke and piping on the shoulders and a curved hemMaterial and Care100% cottonHand wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not tumble dryFlat dry in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
